title: Source policy
content: Every extracted claim must include source URLs, access dates, extraction notes, and a confidence rating. Search should consider all legally accessible evidence tiers: peer-reviewed science, open textbook/reference material, international institutions, extension/public agronomy publications, and industry/grower guides. Paywalled scientific papers or books may be used for metadata discovery, but claim extraction requires accessible text. Unsupported claims must remain in staging.
